name: resonance-update-chk
description: RES Naver Lounge and YouTube update checker for GitHub Actions

scripts.verify: node --check src/collectors/common.js && node --check src/collectors/naver.js && node --check src/collectors/youtube.js && node --check src/notifier/discord.js && node --check tools/check-updates.mjs && node --check tools/send-test-notification.mjs && node --check tools/verify-new-items-fixture.mjs && node tools/verify-new-items-fixture.mjs
